text:
Market today: The mood is cautious. "Looming AI disappointment and rising yields" are the real drivers, directly threatening your tech/chip heavy book. This environment makes growth stocks less appealing and increases margin pressure.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -28.7% and below its stop. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is also down -9.58% and needs close monitoring. QQQI is flagged for a trim at -1.86%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further news regarding AI regulation or rising yields. Also, watch your leveraged positions (SOXL, SPAL) for stop breaches.

Bottom line: Risk management and respecting your stops are paramount in this environment, especially with your concentrated, leveraged portfolio.
plays: Immediately address SOXL; it's a leveraged ETF deeply in the red and below its stop. Consider selling to cut losses.
Trim QQQI as indicated to reduce exposure, especially given the cautious market sentiment for tech.
Monitor SPAL closely; as a new, leveraged position already down, respect its stop at 21.38 if it breaks.
